name: paperclip-pause
description: Paperclip Pause / Run Agent Control plugin — system-wide toggle that pauses all running agents into a resumable state (no work loss) and prevents all idle agents from picking up new tasks. The Pause/Run button is mounted in the host top bar to the right of the version badge.
author: Stack-Alerts

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @paperclipai/plugin-sdk ensure-build-deps && pnpm exec esbuild src/worker.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/worker.js --external:electron --external:fsevents && pnpm exec esbuild src/manifest.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/manifest.js --external:electron --external:fsevents && pnpm exec esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:electron --external:fsevents && pnpm exec esbuild src/constants.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/constants.js --external:electron --external:fsevents && pnpm exec esbuild src/manifest.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=es2020 --format=esm --outfile=dist/manifest.d.ts.map --external:electron --external:fsevents --legal-comments=inline && pnpm exec esbuild src/ui/index.tsx --bundle --format=esm --target=es2020 --jsx=automatic --loader:.tsx=tsx --loader:.ts=ts --loader:.js=js --external:@paperclipai/plugin-sdk/ui --external:react --external:react-dom --outfile=dist/ui/index.js
